basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 3 Research Associate and Technical Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 15-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology, MSc/MTech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology
qualification.details: Research Associate: PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology with prior experience in wet lab and molecular biology using algae. In silico vector design, DNA cloning, Genetic transformation of microorganisms, PCR, RT-PCR, ddPCR, GC-MS, Southern blot analysis, western blotting, DNA sequencing, outdoor cultivation of algae in photobioreactors, and in vitro maintenance of transgenic microalgae, etc. Technical Assistant: MSc/MTech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.international_centre_for_genetic_enginee: PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology, MSc/MTech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICGEB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Associate: PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology with prior experience in wet lab and molecular biology using algae. In silico vector design, DNA cloning, Genetic transformation of microorganisms, PCR, RT-PCR, ddPCR, GC-MS, Southern blot analysis, western blotting, DNA sequencing, outdoor cultivation of algae in photobioreactors, and in vitro maintenance of transgenic microalgae, etc. Technical Assistant: MSc/MTech in Life Sciences/Biotechnology

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICGEB recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICGEB Research Associate and Technical Assistant posts is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by ICGEB for the positions of Research Associate and Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: For the Research Associate position, candidates must hold a PhD in Life Sciences/Biotechnology with relevant wet lab and molecular biology experience, particularly with algae.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Technical Assistant position is an MSc or MTech degree in Life Sciences or Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICGEB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for this ICGEB recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these positions?
faq.answer: Interested candidates are required to apply by sending their applications via email to the designated email address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ICGEB recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve an initial CV screening followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The recruitment for these positions at ICGEB is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of ICGEB?
faq.answer: The official website of the International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) is https://www.icgeb.org.
